title: Psiguria longipedunculata
taxonomy: Psiguria longipedunculata belongs to the family Cucurbitaceae, commonly known as the gourd or cucumber family. It is a species of flowering plant in the order Cucurbitales. This plant is native to the Americas and has been classified into various taxonomic categories over time. The classification of Psiguria longipedunculata is based on its morphology, anatomy, and molecular characteristics. As a result, it has been placed within the genus Psiguria, which is a group of flowering plants that share similar characteristics.
